steps.user_prompt:
I'm working on a COBOL chess engine (chess-engine.cob). The engine currently has:
- Alpha-beta with iterative deepening (max 20 plies)
- Quiescence search with delta pruning
- Late Move Reductions (LMR) 
- Piece-square tables for all pieces
bash_samples:
# Test with a position where seeing checks deeper matters
# Mate in 2: White Kh1, Qf3, Bf1; Black Kg8, Rh7, Pa7 - Qf7+ Kh8 Qxh7#
echo -e "uci\nposition fen 6k1/p6r/8/8/8/5Q2/8/5B1K

# Let me test a position where the engine must see a longer check sequence
# Endgame: should still see king centralization
echo -e "uci\nposition fen 8/8/4k3/8/8/8/4P3/4K3 w - - 0
